description_long: This object consists of a small group of wooden barrels, some upright and some lying on their sides, arranged on a grassy surface. The barrels are constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by dark metal hoops, giving them a classic, rustic appearance. Two of the barrels have swords or similar metallic objects inserted into their tops, suggesting a decorative or thematic use, possibly for a medieval or fantasy urban setting. Nearby, there are a few dark, irregularly shaped stones and a wooden barrel lid resting on the ground. The wood texture is visible, with a natural brown color and subtle grain, while the metal bands and swords add a contrasting metallic sheen. The overall scene suggests storage or a gathering spot, likely found in an outdoor urban or market environment.
description: A cluster of wooden barrels with metal hoops, some upright and some on their sides, accompanied by stones and a loose lid, with swords inserted into two barrels.
description_view_0: Three upright barrels with swords inserted, one barrel lying on its side, all grouped on a grassy surface.
description_view_1: Barrels are seen from an angle showing the loose lid and several dark stones in the foreground.
description_view_2: The arrangement highlights the barrels, lid, and stones, with the swords clearly visible in the barrels.
description_view_3: The view emphasizes the side of the barrels, the loose lid, and the grouping of stones, with swords still visible.
